title: Section 18
content: The registration offices shall be inspected and the registers kept therein shall be examined in such manner and by such authority as may be specified 1[in general or special order by the Chief Registrar".
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 20 of 2023, s. 14, for "by the District Registrar" (w.e.f. 1-10-2023).
